title: Fix the broken Job and schedule a CronJob
scenario: Two problems have been found in the CI/CD pipeline. First, the `db-migrate` Job has `completions: 0` which means Kubernetes never runs any pod. Second, the `db-backup` CronJob has a malformed cron schedule `* * * *` (only 4 fields — cron requires 5). Fix both issues: the Job should run exactly once to completion, and the CronJob should trigger every hour.
starterYaml:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: db-migrate
  namespace: default
spec:
  completions: 0
  backoffLimit: 3
  template:
    spec:
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: migrate
        image: alpine:3.18
        command: ["/bin/sh", "-c", "echo Running DB migrations...; sleep 5; echo Done"]
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "100m"
            memory: "64Mi"
---
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: CronJob
metadata:
  name: db-backup
  namespace: default
spec:
  schedule: "* * * *"
  jobTemplate:
    spec:
      template:
        spec:
          restartPolicy: Never
          containers:
          - name: backup
            image: alpine:3.18
            command: ["/bin/sh", "-c", "echo Backing up database...; sleep 10; echo Backup done"]
            resources:
              requests:
                cpu: "100m"
                memory: "64Mi"

objectives.description: CronJob schedule is a valid 5-field cron expression

hints.text: For the Job: `completions: 0` tells Kubernetes to run zero pods and immediately consider the Job complete — nothing actually runs. Change it to `completions: 1`.
For the CronJob: a cron expression has 5 fields (minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week). `* * * *` only has 4. For every hour, use `0 * * * *`.
Remember you cannot edit a running Job's spec — delete it first with `kubectl delete job db-migrate`, then re-apply with `completions: 1`. The CronJob can be patched in place.

solution:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: db-migrate
  namespace: default
spec:
  completions: 1
  backoffLimit: 3
  template:
    spec:
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: migrate
        image: alpine:3.18
        command: ["/bin/sh", "-c", "echo Running DB migrations...; sleep 5; echo Done"]
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "100m"
            memory: "64Mi"
---
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: CronJob
metadata:
  name: db-backup
  namespace: default
spec:
  schedule: "0 * * * *"
  jobTemplate:
    spec:
      template:
        spec:
          restartPolicy: Never
          containers:
          - name: backup
            image: alpine:3.18
            command: ["/bin/sh", "-c", "echo Backing up database...; sleep 10; echo Backup done"]
            resources:
              requests:
                cpu: "100m"
                memory: "64Mi"
